signal.description: Continuous session remains paused with runs_completed=0 after governed run_completed, requiring manual rerun to continue

evidence.value: Governed run completed with all gates passed and event evt_ccea9d17a8e854df run_completed, but .agentxchain/continuous-session.json remained status=paused and runs_completed=0 with current_run_id=run_7a910fe9b6ccd8c7. agentxchain status --json showed no drift, no active turn, state.status=completed, and next_actions recommended manually running agentxchain run --continuous. Manual rerun output: Resuming existing continuous session cont-be8f0614. Blocked run resolved — resuming continuous session. New PM turn dispatched: turn_fb88572892225850. Expected: after run_completed with VISION still open, continuous mode should increment runs_completed and auto-dispatch the next run without requiring an operator rerun. Evidence paths: /Users/shivamtiwari.highlevel/VS Code/1008apps/tusq.cloud/tusq.dev-main-merge/.agentxchain/continuous-session.json, /Users/shivamtiwari.highlevel/VS Code/1008apps/tusq.cloud/tusq.dev-main-merge/.agentxchain/events.jsonl, /Users/shivamtiwari.highlevel/VS Code/1008apps/tusq.cloud/tusq.dev-main-merge/.agentxchain/state.json
